title: Random Fly Behavior
description: Allows a mob to randomly fly around.

avoid_damage_blocks.title: Avoid Damage Blocks
avoid_damage_blocks.description:
If true, the mob will avoid blocks that cause damage when flying.

Sample values:
• parrot: true

can_land_on_trees.title: Can Land On Trees
can_land_on_trees.description:
If true, the mob can stop flying and land on a tree instead of the ground

Sample values:
• parrot: true

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• parrot: 1

xz_dist.title: Xz Dist
xz_dist.description:
Distance in blocks on ground that the mob will look for a new spot to move to. Must be at least 1

Sample values:
• parrot: 15

y_dist.title: y Dist
y_dist.description:
Distance in blocks that the mob will look up or down for a new spot to move to. Must be at least 1

Sample values:
• parrot: 1

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
